subject: Add ut for ActivateSliceService and update ut for ActivateCommunicationService
commit_message:
Add ut for ActivateSliceService and update ut for ActivateCommunicationService

Issue-ID: SO-2368

Change-Id: I0ec9db116fae10c63e0de9582491e80600a9b145
Signed-off-by: hetengjiao <hetengjiao@chinamobile.com>

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.
